title: MERN Stack - Week 1 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 1 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to master standard Node.js/Express.js backend development, REST API design, and password encryption.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • MVC architecture
  • Express routing and controllers
  • dotenv configurations
  • JWT token generation
  • bcrypt salting and hashing
  • Zod/Joi payload validations.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: User Registration & Auth API Server

Develop a backend Express API with Zod payload validation middleware. Build routes for user registration, user login returning a secure JWT token, and profile fetching routing.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Postman JSON collection with testing scripts, MongoDB Atlas connection verification.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Interns will acquire expertise in setting up secure backend REST APIs and authenticating request headers.

title: MERN Stack - Week 2 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 2 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to master React.js component layouts, single page application routers, and state hooks.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • React JSX syntax
  • useState, useEffect, and useRef hooks
  • React Router DOM v6 private routes
  • Axios interceptors configurations.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Authenticated User Portal UI

Build a responsive React application. Implement login and register forms, save JWT tokens in local state, and build route guards preventing unauthenticated access to the dashboard.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Clean React directories styled with Tailwind CSS layouts.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Capability to build interactive React applications, validate forms, and protect private routes.

title: MERN Stack - Week 3 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 3 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to integrate WebSockets and cloud media upload pipelines into the full-stack MERN application.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • TCP/IP WebSocket protocols vs HTTP
  • Socket.io client-server connection
  • namespace rooms
  • Multer multipart/form-data upload
  • Cloudinary media APIs.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Real-Time Sync Feed & Profile Avatar Uploader

Implement real-time features using Socket.io to sync task states immediately. Build an avatar upload route on the backend that uploads pictures to Cloudinary.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Working real-time websocket module files and cloud file uploader routes.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Proficiency in bidirectional websocket networks and cloud storage APIs.

title: MERN Stack - Week 4 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 4 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to audit API security, write backend integration tests, and deploy both components of the MERN stack live.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • CORS header rules
  • Helmet security modules
  • Jest testing frameworks
  • Render/Vercel continuous deployment workflows.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Secure Production Deployment and Jest Test Suites

Write backend integration tests using Jest and Supertest. Prevent script injections. Deploy the API to Render and the React app to Vercel.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Production live URL link and Jest test-runs reports.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Confidence to deploy fully secured, tested full-stack web applications.

title: MERN Stack - Week 5 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 5 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to implement global state management using Redux Toolkit and optimize requests using caching.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Redux store configuration
  • Redux Toolkit slices
  • Async Thunks for operations
  • RTK Query fetching and caching strategies.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Global State & RTK Query Catalog Integration

Migrate local component states to RTK. Set up auto-refetch rules so updates invalidate cache instantly.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • RTK store slices and React client components state display.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Ability to build scalable state networks, caching queries, and reducing load latency.

title: MERN Stack - Week 6 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 6 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to master React Hook Form validations and create a reusable, accessible component UI kit.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • React Hook Form controller hooks
  • Zod validation schema integrations
  • Tailwind dark theme variables configurations.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Sleek Valided Dashboard Form UI Kit

Develop a reusable layout kit styled with Tailwind CSS, integrating fields validated with React Hook Form and Zod.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Clean reusable frontend component directory with theme-switching controls.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Skill to build accessible, beautifully styled user inputs with inline error validation.

title: MERN Stack - Week 7 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 7 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to understand relational databases and integrate PostgreSQL schemas into the MERN environment.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Relational database designs
  • SQL schemas and tables
  • Mongoose schemas vs Postgres tables
  • writing SQL JOIN queries.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: PostgreSQL Database Catalog schema

Set up a local Postgres database, write migration schemas, and execute JOIN queries to fetch relational categories.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Postgres database schemas and query execution script files.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Understand relational database schemas and compare SQL tables against NoSQL collections.

title: MERN Stack - Week 8 Curriculum
description:
Objective

The objective of Week 8 (configured for a 8 weeks path) is to integrate in-memory caching using Redis to reduce database read latencies.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Key learning theories and framework specifications
2. Detailed Concepts
  • In-memory caching architectures
  • Redis keys and values
  • read-through and write-through cache eviction policies.

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Redis Database Caching API Middleware

Write an Express middleware intercepting catalog read requests, storing values in Redis with expiry timers.

Deliverables

  • Live Swagger API Documentation Link, Live Demo URL & Public GitHub Repository URL (MANDATORY / MUST)
  • Redis middleware code module and benchmark speed charts.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands and project structures.

Learning Outcomes

Decreased database read query latencies by over 80% on high-load endpoints.
